since_last: 26% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads -0.06%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 26% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.30% · BTC -0.39% · Gold -0.87% · Nasdaq100 -1.31%. 26% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at -0.06%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.06%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.13%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: OKLO is the standout at -9.54%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.55%, INTU +3.85%, BIDU +2.87%, CRM +2.71%, ZBRA +2.68%. Laggards: OKLO -9.54%, SMR -9.39%, MRVL -8.69%, CEVA -8.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.46% at $133.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.46% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
